title: Expand Games and Movies/TV Sections to 100 Entries Each

requirements.summary: Update GamesSection.tsx to display 100 games with search/filter UI and maintain GamePlayer modal functionality
acceptanceCriteria: GamesSection displays all 100 game entries in the responsive grid
The fallback hardcoded list in GamesSection.tsx contains at least 100 games matching the backend data
A search or genre filter UI element is present to help browse 100+ games
Clicking Play Now on any game opens the GamePlayer modal with the correct embed URL
Grid layout remains visually consistent with the existing neon blue EDUrocks theme
No game cards overflow or break the layout

file_operations.description: Expand the hardcoded fallback games array to 100 total entries with diverse genres (action, puzzle, arcade, racing, strategy, IO, platformer, sports, shooter, idle, etc.). Add a search input field above the games grid that filters games by title in real-time. Add genre filter badges (clickable buttons) for at least 8 genre categories to help users browse the expanded catalog. Ensure the responsive grid layout (existing grid styling) handles 100 cards without breaking. Maintain the existing GamePlayer modal integration so clicking Play Now on any game card opens the modal with the correct embedUrl. Retain the existing neon blue theme styling and card hover effects.

requirements.summary: Update ShowsSection.tsx to display 100 shows/movies with search/filter UI and maintain VideoPlayer modal functionality
acceptanceCriteria: ShowsSection displays all 100 show/movie entries in the responsive grid
The fallback hardcoded list in ShowsSection.tsx contains at least 100 entries matching the backend data
A search or genre filter UI element is present to help browse 100+ titles
Clicking Watch Now on any entry opens the VideoPlayer modal with the correct YouTube embed URL
Grid layout remains visually consistent with the existing neon blue EDUrocks theme
No show cards overflow or break the layout

file_operations.description: Expand the hardcoded fallback shows array to 100 total entries with diverse genres (drama, comedy, action, thriller, sci-fi, anime, documentary, horror, romance, crime, fantasy, etc.) and a mix of TV shows and movies. Add a search input field above the shows grid that filters titles by name in real-time. Add genre filter badges (clickable buttons) for at least 8 genre categories to help users navigate the expanded catalog. Ensure all embedUrl values follow the YouTube embed format (https://www.youtube.com/embed/<videoId>). Maintain the responsive grid layout to handle 100 cards without visual breakage. Preserve the existing VideoPlayer modal integration so clicking Watch Now opens the modal with the correct embed URL. Retain the existing neon blue theme styling and card hover effects.
